hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command // \"\""); if printf "%s" "$cmd" | grep -Eq "git[[:space:]]+commit"; then printf "%s" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"Confirm: commit? (.clinerules — only when your last message asked)."}}'; elif printf "%s" "$cmd" | grep -Eq "reset-db\.sh|rm[[:space:]].*\.(db|sqlite|sqlite3)"; then printf "%s" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"Confirm: reset/delete the DB? Irreversible — real runs, no backup."}}'; fi
